name: fancy-gdocs
description: Google Docs DSL compiler — write docs in JSON, get formatted documents

tools.name: create_doc
tools.description: Create a Google Doc from a DSL specification

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read a Google Doc and return its content as DSL blocks

tools.name: validate_spec
tools.description: Validate a document spec without creating it

credentials.name: Google Docs (via Zapier)
credentials.description: Zapier SDK connection for Google Docs API access
